op.CHEN_QIANYU.potential.1.event.descrip.text: DMG Dealt +20% to enemies below 50% HP.

op.CHEN_QIANYU.potential.3.event.descrip.text: Battle skill Ascending Strike, combo skill Soar to the Stars, and ultimate Blade Gale improved: DMG Multiplier is increased to 1.1 times the original.

op.CHEN_QIANYU.potential.4.event.descrip.text: Ultimate Blade Gale improved: Ultimate Energy cost -15%.

op.CHEN_QIANYU.potential.5.event.descrip.text: Combo skill Soar to the Stars improved: Length of cooldown is now {coolDown:0}s.

op.CHEN_QIANYU.skill.ASCENDING_STRIKE.ev.text: Performs an uppercut slash at the target enemy, dealing Physical DMG and Lift.

op.CHEN_QIANYU.skill.BLADE_GALE.event.de.text: A 7-sequence slash attack that deals Physical DMG with each sequence to the target enemy. The final slash sequence deals even more DMG.

op.CHEN_QIANYU.skill.SOARING_BREAK_BATK..text: An attack with up to 5 sequences that deals Physical DMG. As the controlled operator, Final Strike also deals {poise:0} Stagger.

op.CHEN_QIANYU.skill.SOARING_BREAK_DIVE..text: Basic attack performed in mid-air becomes a dive attack that deals Physical DMG to nearby enemies.

op.CHEN_QIANYU.skill.SOARING_BREAK_FINIS.text: Basic attack performed near a Staggered enemy becomes a finisher that deals massive Physical DMG and recovers some SP.

op.CHEN_QIANYU.skill.SOAR_TO_THE_STARS.e.text: When an enemy becomes Vulnerable. A slashing dash that passes through the target enemy and deals Physical DMG and Lift to all enemies along the way.

op.CHEN_QIANYU.talent.MOMENTUM_BREAKER_T.text: Interrupting the enemy's charge up deals another 10 Stagger.

op.CHEN_QIANYU.talent.SLASHING_EDGE_T1.e.text: After hitting an enemy with skills, Chen gains ATK +4%/+8% (L1/L2) for 10s. This effect can reach 5 stacks.
